## Summary

## Verification

<!-- Paste the commands you ran. -->

- [ ] `pnpm test`
- [ ] `pnpm lint`
- [ ] `pnpm build`
- [ ] `pnpm pack:dry-run`
- [ ] `git diff --check`

## Privacy And Security

- [ ] No real prompts, credentials, private paths, local databases, screenshots,
      or prompt archives are included.
- [ ] Hook, export, deletion, or redaction changes were reviewed for privacy
      impact.
- [ ] Public logs and errors do not expose raw prompts or secrets.

## UI

- [ ] Not applicable
- [ ] Browser flow checked with `pnpm e2e:browser`
- [ ] English and Korean user-facing text were both checked
